# Holding Post-Mortem Template

Date:
Ticker:
Position open date:
Position close date:

## 1) Original Thesis

- What was the core thesis at entry?
- Which catalysts were expected?

## 2) Outcome Summary

- Return outcome:
- Time held:
- Expected vs actual path:

## 3) Thesis Accuracy

- Thesis right / partially right / wrong:
- What specifically was right?
- What specifically was wrong?

## 4) Catalyst Assessment

| Catalyst | Expected Timing | Actual Outcome | Lesson |
|----------|-----------------|----------------|--------|
|          |                 |                |        |

## 5) Risk / Downside Assessment

- Was downside estimated reasonably at entry?
- Which risks were underestimated?
- Which risks were overestimated?

## 6) Sizing Assessment

- Was size appropriate for confidence and downside?
- If not, what should size have been?

## 7) Sell Decision Review

- Which sell trigger fired?
- Was exit timing appropriate?
- If early/late, why?
